summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Platform Admin Dashboard (لوحة تحكم مدير المنصة) for NASSAQ School Management System - Iteration 14. Frontend testing focused on: Add School Wizard, Quick Actions, AI Operations Panel, Sidebar Navigation, Analytics Cards, and Filters. Found 1 CRITICAL bug in Add School Wizard and several 404 pages for unimplemented routes.

minor.issue: Frontend sends fields (country, language, calendar_system, school_type, stage, principal_name, principal_email, principal_phone) but backend SchoolCreate model requires 'code' and 'email' fields. Mismatch causes validation error.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: After clicking 'تأكيد الإنشاء' (Confirm Creation) in Step 4, React throws runtime error: 'Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {type, loc, msg, input, url})'. School is created in backend but frontend crashes.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend sends different fields than backend expects. Frontend sends: country, language, calendar_system, school_type, stage, principal_name, principal_email, principal_phone. Backend requires: code, email. This causes validation error response which crashes the UI.

missing_pages_404.description: The following sidebar routes return 404 (expected as per test request - pages not implemented yet)

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Add School Wizard - The handleCreateSchool function in AdminDashboard.jsx sends fields that don't match backend SchoolCreate model. Either update frontend to send required fields (code, email) or update backend to accept the fields frontend sends (country, language, calendar_system, school_type, stage, principal_name, principal_email, principal_phone)
CRITICAL: Fix React error in wizard success step - The error response object is being rendered as React child. Need to handle error properly in catch block
Create missing pages: /admin/users, /admin/teacher-requests, /admin/rules, /admin/monitoring, /admin/integrations, /admin/security, /admin/communication (or add placeholder pages)
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx line 277-301: handleCreateSchool sends fields that don't match backend SchoolCreate model - needs synchronization
Backend server.py line 117-126: SchoolCreate model requires 'code' and 'email' but frontend wizard doesn't collect these fields
The wizard collects: name, name_en, country, city, address, language, calendar_system, school_type, stage, principal_name, principal_phone, principal_email
The backend expects: name, name_en, code, email, phone, address, city, region, student_capacity
AI Operations (import_analyzer, config_suggestion, report_builder, alerts_review) show 'قيد التطوير' (under development) - MOCKED as expected

success_rate.frontend: 85% - 17/20 tests passed, 3 failed (1 critical bug, 2 missing pages)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Admin Dashboard testing completed. CRITICAL BUG: Add School Wizard crashes on Step 5 (Success) due to frontend-backend field mismatch. The wizard collects different fields than what the backend SchoolCreate model expects. AI Operations Panel works correctly - 4 operations (diagnosis, data_quality, tenant_health, executive_summary) have real API implementations. 4 operations (import_analyzer, config_suggestion, report_builder, alerts_review) are MOCKED and show 'قيد التطوير'. Several sidebar routes return 404 as expected (pages not implemented yet).

mocked_apis.note: These AI operations show 'هذه الميزة قيد التطوير' (This feature is under development) toast message

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Add School Wizard crashes on confirmation
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Frontend-Backend field mismatch. Frontend sends: {name, name_en, country, city, address, language, calendar_system, school_type, stage, principal_name, principal_email, principal_phone}. Backend SchoolCreate model requires: {name, name_en, code, email, phone, address, city, region, student_capacity}. Missing required fields 'code' and 'email' cause Pydantic validation error. The error response object is then incorrectly rendered as React child.
reproduction_steps: 3. Fill Step 1: School name, city, address
5. Fill Step 3: Principal name, phone, email
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Update AdminDashboard.jsx handleCreateSchool to generate a unique code and use principal_email as the school email, OR update backend SchoolCreate model to make code optional and auto-generate it
